Union Budget 2026-27: Focus on Tier-2/3 cities [Hindustan Times article]. Union budget mein tier-2 aur tier-3 nagaron ko kya mila?
POLL: By how much has the XVI Finance Commission increased the untied grant from 21%? 45% (2 votes) / 52% (1 vote) / 30% (0) / 35% (0)
Answer: 52%. Document analyses the Rs 3.56 lakh crore XVI FC grant for Urban Local Bodies, a 230% increase. [PDF: Janaagraha on XVI FC Grants]
The 16th Finance Commission will provide 52% untied grant for next 5 years. Up to 20% of untied funds can be spent on road construction.
XVI FC Delivers Historic Win for Indias Cities\! [Article link: https://bit.ly/4rznY5u]
